shortDescription: A draft self-guided Baltimore walking tour pack with live script narration, maps, Compass guidance, and routes centered on Pennsylvania Avenue Black arts and harbor labor history.
fullDescription: Baltimore Tours is the first non-Philly city pack in the platform. The current draft includes two researched routes: Pennsylvania Avenue Black Arts and Harbor Labor & Freedom. Together they connect neighborhood cultural memory, museums, transportation sites, and waterfront labor stories while the remaining Baltimore launch tours are still being researched and produced.
